meta_title: For Founders: SaaS starter kit to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: SaaS Starter Kit to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Stop chasing clients without proof. Use this SaaS starter kit guide with Antigravity and Claude Code to build a high-converting MVP in hours, not months.
content.answer_block: To overcome the 'no portfolio' trap, stop building free work and start shipping high-value SaaS micro-tools. By leveraging an opinionated SaaS starter kit, you compress months of development into days. Use Antigravity for rapid architecture scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative feature deployment to prove your technical authority immediately.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen, the silence of a non-existent portfolio echoing against your ambition. Every potential client asks for 'past work,' and every time you answer, you feel the opportunity slip away. The cold reality is that the market doesn't care about your potential; it cares about your proof of execution.

But here is the secret: you don't need a decade of agency work to build authority. You need a high-velocity SaaS starter kit that turns your ideas into live, revenue-generating reality. By moving from 'aspiring developer' to 'SaaS founder,' you bypass the portfolio gatekeepers and let your live, functioning product speak for itself.

steps.title: Define the High-Value MVP Scope
steps.description: Don't build a platform; build a utility. Identify a single, painful problem you can solve in 48 hours to establish instant credibility.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a lean SaaS architecture schema for a B2B productivity tool that solves [Problem]. Focus on Auth, Stripe integration, and a clean dashboard.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Auth & Payments Layer
steps.description: Never write auth from scratch. Use your starter kit to integrate Supabase and Stripe immediately so you can focus on the unique value proposition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure user authentication with Row Level Security (RLS) policies and set up a Stripe checkout session for a monthly subscription model.

steps.title: Implement the Core Logic with Claude Code
steps.description: Use Claude Code to iterate on the core feature. This ensures your code is production-ready and follows clean architecture principles.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the server-side logic for the core feature, ensuring modular code that is easily extensible.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'implement core business logic for [Feature] with tests'

steps.title: Deploy to Production Environment
steps.description: A live URL is worth a thousand GitHub commits. Get your app on Vercel immediately to start gathering user feedback.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the necessary Vercel configuration files and environment variable templates for production deployment.

steps.title: Optimize for Social Proof
steps.description: Add a 'Built by [You]' footer and a public changelog. This turns your product into a living, breathing portfolio piece.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a simple, elegant public changelog component that pulls from the git history.

pro_tips: Always prioritize 'Time to First Dollar' over feature completeness; a paid user is better than a perfect codebase.
Use Claude Code to run automated tests on every push; your code quality is your reputation.
When asked for a portfolio, send the live URL of your SaaS instead of a GitHub link; founders prefer products over code.
Build in public on X or LinkedIn during the development phase to create a 'build-log' that serves as social proof before the app launches.
Keep your SaaS micro-focused; a niche tool is significantly more impressive to clients than a broad, unfinished platform.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, spend 80% of your time on distribution. Reach out to 10 potential users in your niche, offer them the tool for free in exchange for a testimonial, and watch your portfolio transform from a list of promises into a track record of success.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for permission to be an expert. Build the product, capture the revenue, and own your narrative. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
